title: Minimal Premium Logo — {BUSINESS_NAME}
prompt: Create a professional modern logo for {BUSINESS_NAME}, minimalist vector design, clean typography, premium branding, simple icon, white background, scalable SVG-ready composition, monochrome and color variations, centered composition, negative space usage, balanced proportions, clean outlines, no watermarks or extraneous text, high quality logo.
negativePrompt: lowres, blurry, watermark, photorealistic textures, complex gradients, text overlays, distorted proportions

title: Flat Animal Head Logo — {BRAND_NAME}
prompt: Flat vector logo of a {ANIMAL} head, minimal geometric graphic design, clean negative space, modern branding, inspired by world-class identity design, bold and memorable silhouette, professional vector mark, premium logo design, black and white, scalable SVG style, centered composition, brand name "{BRAND_NAME}" integrated with clean modern typography, no realistic photo details, no shading, no 3D effects, no gradients.
negativePrompt: photorealistic, shading, gradients, 3D effects, lowres, blurry, watermark, text overlays
